events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr! From the Fab Four to his enduring solo career, his beat has defined generations.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and songwriter, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! His distinctive guitar sound with Queen has given us some of rock's most unforgettable anthems.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still moving like Jagger at 83! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger, whose energy and stage presence remain legendary.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: MTV Launch
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game. It all began with The Buggles asking if video truly killed the radio star. We think radio is doing just fine, thank you very much!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British rock. That album was, well, definitely something.

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a pivotal event in 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. A legendary moment that defined a generation.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91
events.blurb: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 years old.

angles.name: Elvis Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring legacy of Elvis Presley today. The King may have left the building, but his music lives on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55
events.blurb: On this day, we remember the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away in 1996 and would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur today. His lyrics and legacy continue to resonate, 55 years since his birth.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 years old.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His revolutionary guitar playing would have seen him turn 84 today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on September 26, 1969, featuring its famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the distinctive voice and frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock 'n' roll icon Chrissie Hynde! Still delivering those Pretenders classics with unmistakable style.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still rocking, still iconic, still definitely maybe.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on October 11, 1971, becoming one of his most influential solo works.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message of peace that resonates as powerfully today as it did then.

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket.'

angles.name: iPod Launch
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the original iPod dropped and changed how we listen to music forever. Remember the scroll wheel?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred! It's James Bond Day, celebrating over six decades of 007's iconic adventures and unforgettable theme tunes.

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86
events.blurb: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the legendary musician and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On his 86th birthday, we honour the enduring spirit and musical legacy of John Lennon. Imagine all the music still to inspire.
